mapper.insert:
/* ESS충방전량 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_ess_charge ( site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, chg_val, dischg_val, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.chgVal}, #{entity.dischgVal}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* ESS충방전량 수정 */ UPDATE tb_ess_charge
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
device_id = #{entity.deviceId},
std_timestamp = #{entity.stdTimestamp},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
chg_val = #{entity.chgVal},
dischg_val = #{entity.dischgVal},
mod_date = NOW()
WHERE ess_chg_idx = #{entity.essChgIdx}
mapper.select: /* ESS충방전량 상세조회 */ SELECT ess_chg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, chg_val, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_charge WHERE ess_chg_idx = #{essChgIdx}

/* ESS충방전량 목록조회 */ SELECT ess_chg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, chg_val, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_charge
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}

/* 마지막 ESS충방전량 상세조회 */ SELECT ess_chg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, chg_val, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_charge WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY std_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

/* ESS충방전량 상세조회ByUnique */ SELECT ess_chg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, chg_val, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_charge WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND device_id = #{deviceId} AND std_timestamp = #{stdTimestamp}
